name: gemma-san-mid
voice: A warm mid-range young woman's voice — softly melodic with a gentle breathy succubus lilt, a touch lower and rounder than bright-and-girlish; playful and confident, expressive and teasing, a knowing smile in the tone.
description: In-between variant of the Gemma-san host voice — sits between the bright base (gemma-san) and the sultry gemma-san-deep. Per-line emotion via each clip's `emotion`/`instruct`. Catchphrase: 'fufu~'.
notes: Designed-voice variant: mid register. Switch + Regenerate in the editor (clip 'voice' selector) to audition against gemma-san and gemma-san-deep. Tune `voice`/`seed` and re-run the TTS provider to preview.
